mainEntity.name: How do NY vs California AI ethics rules differ for law firm marketing?
mainEntity.text: How do NY vs California AI ethics rules differ for law firm marketing?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY Rule 7.1 bans misleading ads strictly; CA allows more AI disclosure flexibility but requires supervision. Both demand verifiable claims in GEO content.

suggestedAnswer.text: NY enforces tighter pre-approval for ads; CA focuses on outcome transparency. For cross-jurisdiction firms, use dual-compliant templates. Audit AI outputs monthly; violations cost $10k+ in fines.

name: NY vs CA AI Ethics for Law Firm GEO
description: NY Rule 7.1 bans misleading ads strictly; CA allows more AI disclosure flexibility but requires supervision. Both demand verifiable claims in GEO content.
